summary: Customers in Karnataka prefer Samsung devices for battery life and stable after-sales service.
opportunity: Mid-premium users in Bengaluru are open to switching if camera quality improves.
recommendation: Run creator-focused campaigns in Bengaluru and Mysuru.

summary: Demand in Telangana is price-sensitive with strong uptake in feature-rich mid-range devices.
opportunity: Competitor presence is lower in Warangal for premium accessories bundles.
recommendation: Increase digital ad spend in Hyderabad and test city-specific bundles in Warangal.

summary: Maharashtra skews toward premium and aspirational brands, especially in Mumbai and Pune.
opportunity: There is room to grow in Nagpur where premium competition is softer.
recommendation: Position Vibranium One as performance-first with exchange offers.

summary: Tamil Nadu shows strong conversion when product messaging emphasizes reliability and localized support.
opportunity: Coimbatore has high intent for value-premium devices.
recommendation: Partner with regional retail chains and push localized language creatives.

summary: Delhi NCR has high competitor saturation but strong demand for launch offers and ecosystem bundles.
opportunity: Noida can be targeted with student-focused bundles and EMI options.
recommendation: Deploy high-frequency campaigns tied to festival windows.
